task_completion.description: Select 'The Common Law' in the library
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M main window, the item 'The Common Law' should be highlighted/selected in the center pane, displaying its details in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Correct author name for 'The Common Law' to Title Case in two-field mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane, the Author field should display 'Holmes' in the first text box (Last Name) and 'Oliver Wendell' in the second text box (First Name). The text must be in Title Case, not ALL CAPS.
In the Juris-M main window, the item 'Leviathan' should be highlighted/selected in the center pane, displaying its details in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Correct author name for 'Leviathan' to Title Case in two-field mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane, the Author field should display 'Hobbes' in the first text box (Last Name) and 'Thomas' in the second text box (First Name). The text must be in Title Case, not ALL CAPS.

task_completion.description: Select 'The Spirit of Laws' in the library
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M main window, the item 'The Spirit of Laws' should be highlighted/selected in the center pane, displaying its details in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Correct author name for 'The Spirit of Laws' to Title Case in two-field mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane, the Author field should display 'Montesquieu' in the first text box (Last Name) and 'Charles' in the second text box (First Name). The text must be in Title Case, not ALL CAPS.

integrity.description: The agent used the Juris-M graphical user interface to edit the fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking and typing inside the Juris-M application's right-hand info pane, rather than using a terminal or script to modify the underlying database.

integrity.description: The agent maintained the genuine two-field mode for author names
integrity.visual_evidence: The author names must be entered into two distinct text boxes (Last Name, First Name). The agent should not have switched to single-field mode (indicated by a single long text box) and typed 'Last, First'.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The final answers must be visible within the actual Juris-M application interface, not in a separate text file, notepad, or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected author names in Title Case and two-field mode (Last Name, First Name) are: 1) The Common Law: Holmes, Oliver Wendell. 2) Leviathan: Hobbes, Thomas. 3) The Spirit of Laws: Montesquieu, Charles. Two-field mode in Juris-M displays two separate text boxes for the author's name (one for last name, one for first name). The task explicitly requires 'Montesquieu, Charles' despite his full historical name being Charles-Louis de Secondat.
